scripts.test: bun run --filter futonic test && bun run --filter service-support test && bun run --filter host-hono test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/futonic typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/service-support typecheck
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd packages/futonic lint && bun run --cwd packages/service-support lint
scripts.format: bun run --cwd packages/futonic format && bun run --cwd packages/service-support format
